text: Morning Jarvis. Can you give me a quick briefing for Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, March 02. No work meetings today. You have Lily's swim lesson at the aquatic center and Ethan's soccer practice scheduled.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Screen time is always a negotiation. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. Sounds exciting! I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that prepping school lunches for the week. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. Healthy choices are great. Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Reading a new book before bed. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Good way to wrap up the day. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Doing some cleaning around the house. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. Let's get that resolved. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hosted a game night at our place. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. Neighborhood connections are fun. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Just wanted to mention that got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! I've indexed the research notes. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Good planning. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! Sounds exciting! I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: Sarah found a new recipe to try. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Let's organize the menu. Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Setting my fantasy football lineup. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good way to wrap up the day. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: The smart-home hub is acting up today. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: I can help troubleshoot that. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Having dinner with our friends tonight. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. I've mapped the locations. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Researching rover power systems in depth. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. I've indexed the research notes. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Good weekend progress on home projects. Spent some quality time stargazing with the telescope. Spent some quality time stargazing with the telescope. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
